letter:
Re: Billing Discrepancy on Invoice salesforge-202510

To the Billing Department, SalesForge CRM:

We are writing to dispute a discrepancy identified on invoice salesforge-202510, covering the
billing period 2025-10-01 through 2025-10-31.

Per the governing clause (MSA §6.2):

    "Customer shall pay $15.00 per active user per month."

Our records show the contractually correct charge for this period is $33,136.00.
The invoice as billed totals $39,736.00, a discrepancy of $6,600.00.

Calculation:
  - user usage: expected 33000.00, billed 39600.00 (overcharge of 6600.00)

We request a corrected invoice or credit memo reflecting the $6,600.00 adjustment within
thirty (30) days. Please contact us with any questions.

Regards,
Accounts Payable

finding.clause_quote: Customer shall pay $15.00 per active user per month.
finding.explanation: Invoice total is higher than the contract's Virtual Billing Engine replay by 6600.00.
